MARY AI

MARY AI

Your Personal AI Developer: Transforming Your Prompts into Custom-Coded Projects

Potential usage scenarios

Startups

Creating a minimum viable product (MVP) based on an idea and rapid prototyping through Mary.

Medium and large businesses

Automation of individual workflows, development of internal tools, connection of AI solutions for data analysis and integration with CRM.

Education

Mary's platform for learning programming and design with AI mentor.

Freelancing and outsourcing

Rapid prototyping for clients, code and design proofreading support.

Research projects

Creating a “sandbox” for experimenting with new AI models and technologies.

Benefits of the platform

Collaborativeness

The ability for multiple participants to influence the product creation process in real time.

Our platform supports real-time collaboration, allowing the team to collaborate effectively on a project, regardless of their location.

Speed

Shortening the time from idea to prototype.

Our platform significantly speeds up the development process, allowing you to quickly bring ideas to life. This is especially important in today's fast-changing world of technology.

Accessibility

Even non-professionals can get a working MVP by relying on an AI assistant.

Thanks to the intuitive interface and AI-assist, even people without a technical background can create functional prototypes of their ideas.

Monetization options

Subscription

A monthly or annual Advanced Subscription provides access to more code generation, prioritized support, and additional exclusive features to help accelerate your development process and improve efficiency.

Would you like to give it a try?

Get Beta Access

Contract Address (CA)

Available soon

Mary is not just an AI assistant, but an entire ecosystem for “generating the future”: from a simple idea or query text to a real application, web service, b2b tool, etc. The figure of a cyborg girl illustrates the synergy of human creativity and the computational power of artificial intelligence. The goal of the project is to create an environment where anyone (entrepreneur, developer, designer or novice) in close cooperation with AI can build innovative, reliable and beautifully designed digital products.

MARY AI
